channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Oil companies are making billions. In the U.S., calls to tax their windfall are growing
item.description: Higher oil prices since the Iran war began mean many oil companies have brought in excess profits. Some U.S. lawmakers want to tax those windfall profits and give the money to lower-income Americans.
item.content:encoded:
Higher oil prices since the Iran war began mean many oil companies have brought in excess profits. Some U.S. lawmakers want to tax those windfall profits and give the money to lower-income Americans.

(Image credit: Brandon Bell)
item.dc:creator: Julia Simon

item.title: DHS pledged body cams for all immigration agents. Months later, that hasn't happened
item.description: In recent days, federal immigration agents fatally shot two immigrant fathers. None of the federal officers involved were wearing body cameras, the agency said.
item.content:encoded:
In recent days, federal immigration agents fatally shot two immigrant fathers. None of the federal officers involved were wearing body cameras, the agency said.

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago)
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán

item.title: Bike lanes and speed cameras disappear from the DOT's list of proven safety measures
item.description: The Federal Highway Administration quietly stripped bike lanes and other safety recommendations from a key list of best practices. Critics say those measures are proven to cut crashes and save lives.
item.content:encoded:
The Federal Highway Administration quietly stripped bike lanes and other safety recommendations from a key list of best practices. Critics say those measures are proven to cut crashes and save lives.

(Image credit: Heather Diehl)
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: TrumpRx promised a supermarket for cheaper drugs but delivered a boutique
item.description: President Trump said TrumpRx is the biggest thing to happen in healthcare in decades. But an NPR analysis finds drugmakers are only offering deals on a few of their medicines.
item.content:encoded: President Trump said TrumpRx is the biggest thing to happen in healthcare in decades. But an NPR analysis finds drugmakers are only offering deals on a few of their medicines.
item.dc:creator: Sydney Lupkin

item.title: No Asian team managed to go far this World Cup (again). What's holding them back?
item.description: For the sixth World Cup in a row, no team from the Asian Football Confederation made it past the first knockout round, winning only three games out of 29. Asian teams are competitive — up to a point.
item.content:encoded:
For the sixth World Cup in a row, no team from the Asian Football Confederation made it past the first knockout round, winning only three games out of 29. Asian teams are competitive — up to a point.

(Image credit: Luke Hales)
item.dc:creator: Juliana Kim

item.title: The use of force has become a 'default tool' for ICE officers, a new report finds
item.description: An ACLU report looks at the widespread use of force in immigration enforcement in the first year of President Trump's return to office. Recent fatal shootings in Texas and Maine have brought renewed scrutiny to the agency's tactics.
item.content:encoded:
An ACLU report looks at the widespread use of force in immigration enforcement in the first year of President Trump's return to office. Recent fatal shootings in Texas and Maine have brought renewed scrutiny to the agency's tactics.

(Image credit: Scott Olson)
item.dc:creator: Meg Anderson

item.title: Trump earned billions last year. Some Pennsylvania swing voters say they don't care
item.description: Key voters in Pennsylvania are split on whether President Trump earning a big windfall last year is a big deal or not. Their reaction reveals a level of cynicism about many in the political class.
item.content:encoded:
Key voters in Pennsylvania are split on whether President Trump earning a big windfall last year is a big deal or not. Their reaction reveals a level of cynicism about many in the political class.

(Image credit: Alex Wong)
item.dc:creator: Ashley Lopez

item.title: 'Gossip' had godly origins. Here's how it gained its sinful reputation
item.description: We've all engaged in a little 'gossip.' But did you know its origins were tied to family and friendship?
item.content:encoded:
We've all engaged in a little 'gossip.' But did you know its origins were tied to family and friendship?

(Image credit: Fox Photos/Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Jaclyn Diaz

item.title: The band playing when a Bangkok bar caught fire mourns its members among the 33 dead
item.description: Victims of this week's flash fire at a Bangkok music bar that took more than 30 lives included four of the six core members of the band playing when the blaze broke out.
item.content:encoded:
Victims of this week's flash fire at a Bangkok music bar that took more than 30 lives included four of the six core members of the band playing when the blaze broke out.

(Image credit: Sakchai Lalit)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Fear and hope in Utah in the shadow of America's largest wildfire
item.description: People in Monticello, Utah have been tense and preparing to evacuate since shortly after the Babylon fire started June 26th
item.content:encoded:
People in Monticello, Utah have been tense and preparing to evacuate since shortly after the Babylon fire started June 26th

(Image credit: Inciweb)
item.dc:creator: Adam Burke
